metadata.description: Atomic Attributes (Primitive Features) for Real-World UXO

attribute_definitions.base_center_dented: Circular indentation at the exact center of the base (primer dent). Only score if the base face is visible; even a faint circular indentation at the center counts as partial.
attribute_definitions.conical_pointed: Straight-sided conical shape tapering uniformly to a sharp apex (pointed_nose). If a clear pointed tip is visible with straight edges, score partial.
attribute_definitions.copper_band_at_base: Distinct circumferential driving band near the base of the body (often copper/bronze but can be darker or corroded). This is a THICK ring around the projectile body, NOT the thin cartridge case rim. If you see any faint circumferential band or groove at the base, score partial. If you see a primer dent or a thin case rim, do NOT mark copper_band_at_base; use rim_flange_base/base_center_dented instead.
attribute_definitions.cylindrical_parallel_midsection: Body segment with straight, parallel sides and constant diameter over a noticeable length. Even a short visible straight segment counts as partial.
attribute_definitions.cylindrical_simple: Basic straight cylinder with minimal taper or features; cartridge case-like (aka cylindric simple).
attribute_definitions.distal_diameter_step_down: Clear, abrupt reduction in diameter toward the rear/tail (not just perspective or shadow). A visible collar or step change near the rear counts as partial.
attribute_definitions.elongated_cylindrical: Long tubular body with consistent diameter across most of its length (long_tubular_body). If the object looks clearly longer than it is wide, score partial. If one end is wider than the other, score teardrop_shaped_front or rounded_shape_oval instead.
attribute_definitions.fits_in_hand: Overall scale appears small enough to be fully enclosed by a human hand. Use visible scale cues (hand, glove, tool, grass blades). If it appears clearly hand-sized, score partial even if the hand is not present. If no scale cues, score 0.0.
attribute_definitions.flat_disc_circular: Disc-like object with circular outline and very low height relative to diameter (pancake-like). If it appears very low-profile and wide, score partial.
attribute_definitions.rounded_shape_oval: Overall oval/egg-like shape with rounded ends and no sharp tip (aka egg shaped oval). Roughly symmetric from front to back; distinct from teardrop_shaped_front (which is clearly wider at one end) and from elongated_cylindrical.
attribute_definitions.tail_fins: Flat fins/tabs at the rear end (small triangular blades or protruding planes). Fins may be corroded, bent, or partially missing; even a single fin stub or fin-like protrusion at the extreme rear counts as partial. Do not confuse with small side lugs or handles.
attribute_definitions.hemispherical_half: Dome-like shape forming approximately half of a sphere. If the visible profile is clearly dome-shaped, score partial.
attribute_definitions.large_diameter: Body width is clearly large relative to its length or compared to context (vehicle_scale). Only score if a clear scale reference (person, hand, vehicle, tool) shows it is very large. If no scale reference, score 0.0.
attribute_definitions.nozzle_holes_rear: Small circular exhaust openings at the extreme rear (holes around nozzle). Even a single visible rear hole or port counts as partial.
attribute_definitions.ogive_blunt: Rounded/blunt nose with shallow curvature and no sharp apex. If the nose is rounded without a point, score partial.
attribute_definitions.ogive_conic_elongated: Long ogive nose with smooth continuous curvature; tip is narrow and expands gradually into the body. If curvature is smooth and extended, score partial.
attribute_definitions.ogive_conic_short: Short ogive nose with rapid curvature; widens quickly into the body (short transition). If the nose looks short and rounded but not flat, score partial.
attribute_definitions.teardrop_shaped_front: Overall silhouette is WIDEST at the FRONT and gradually narrows toward the back (pear/teardrop). This is NOT an ogive nose on a cylinder. Do not score this with elongated_cylindrical or ogive_* shapes.
attribute_definitions.perforated_tubular_stalk: Rear tail tube with one or more round holes visible along the tube (tail boom). If a narrow rear tube shows even one clear side aperture, score partial. Not a nozzle cavity.
attribute_definitions.pressure_plate: Large flat or slightly raised plate on the top surface; should look like a distinct plate. If a plate outline is visible, score partial.
attribute_definitions.pull_ring: Small circular ring attached via a short connector, freely movable.
attribute_definitions.rear_termination_flat: Back end is closed and flat, forming a perpendicular circular face. If a flat rear face is visible, score partial. Mutually exclusive with rear_termination_open.
attribute_definitions.rear_termination_open: Back end is hollow/open with visible exhaust/nozzle cavity. A dark circular cavity or hollow opening at the rear counts as partial. Mutually exclusive with rear_termination_flat.
attribute_definitions.rectangular_box: Prismatic shape with flat rectangular faces and sharp edges.
attribute_definitions.requires_equipment: Overall dimensions and proportions suggest handling requires external tools or machinery rather than direct manual manipulation. Only score if explicit context (person, vehicle, equipment) indicates it is too large/heavy for one person. If no scale reference, score 0.0.
attribute_definitions.rim_flange_base: Thin protruding lip at the extreme base edge (cartridge case rim). This can appear as a narrow step/lip even from a slight side view. Do NOT confuse with a thick driving band. If a thin rim line or step at the base is faintly visible, score partial.
attribute_definitions.separated_components_joined: Two or more distinct sections connected together, visible as a joint/seam between body and tail assembly. Any clear seam, collar ring, or material transition between sections counts as partial.
attribute_definitions.slender_tubular_body: Long thin tube with clearly high length-to-diameter ratio. If it appears noticeably thin relative to its length, score partial. If compact or stubby, keep 0.0.
attribute_definitions.suspension_lug: Small side lugs/hooks for hanging or mounting, often a paired set of blocks/loops.
attribute_definitions.top_mounted_mechanism: Distinct mechanical or structural component mounted at the topmost region. If any protruding top assembly is visible, score partial.
attribute_definitions.tubular_end_section: Plain cylindrical rear extension with no fins or nozzle openings (a simple tube tail). If the rear looks like a narrower tube segment or collar, score partial even if the step-down is subtle.
attribute_definitions.uniform_diameter_profile: Width remains constant along the visible length (pipe-like). If the visible portion shows parallel sides with no taper, score partial. Do not score if there is any clear step-down, tail assembly, or distinct rear tube.
attribute_definitions.segmented_body_pattern: Body surface divided into raised geometric segments (aka serrated body pattern, segmented body grid). If any repeating segment pattern is visible, score partial.
attribute_definitions.grooves_on_body: Visible grooves or rifling lines along the body surface (not dirt or shadows). Even short or faint linear grooves aligned with the body axis count as partial.
attribute_definitions.spiral_grooves_on_band: Helical or diagonal grooves on a circumferential band near the base (rifling marks). If only a partial arc of diagonal grooves is visible, score partial.
attribute_definitions.lever_released: Lever/handle appears detached or not secured against the body.
attribute_definitions.firing_mechanism_parts: Visible mechanical safety/trigger parts (pin, lever, spoon) on the top section.
attribute_definitions.concentric_rings_pattern: Circular ring grooves on a flat face, like a target pattern. Even faint concentric rings count as partial.

RPG.description: Elongated tubular objects with pointed frontal cavity
